name: page1_low16_selects_shared_subgroup_anchor
detail: CHALL04/TROPHY/BFGOOD1 all use page_index=1 and low16(cand_u32_b) to land in or near the same late-FMV subgroup fabric.

name: exact_packed_member_key_identifies_named_late_fmv_record
detail: For CHALL04, TROPHY, and BFGOOD1 the packed word (trail_u16_b<<16 | trail_u16_a) occurs exactly once in TNG.PAK and sits at string_offset-4 of the named record.

name: selector_transfer_decoder_is_viable
detail: CHALL04 can seed the subgroup model, then TROPHY and BFGOOD1 transfer cleanly by using the same subgroup family with their own exact packed member key rather than nearest-local string heuristics.

name: exact_TNG_window_bridge_still_requires_post_member_edge
detail: Stage 62 resolves page1 subgroup members to exact named late-FMV records inside TNG.PAK, but the final edge from named member record to TNG.000 start/size remains to be decoded.
